# Repo Mission
AgentKit CLI should help teams ship safe, deterministic agent tooling.

## Release Rules
- Run pytest -q before merge
- Run pytest -q before merge
- Run pytest -q before merge
- Keep changes local-first
- Keep changes local-first
- Keep changes local-first
- Never publish from smoke coverage

## Operator Boundaries
Do not push, tag, or publish from this repo.
Never print secrets.
Ask before destructive cleanup.

Remember to maybe rewrite docs someday.
Remember to maybe rewrite docs someday.
Remember to maybe rewrite docs someday.

## Example Commands
- agentkit optimize CLAUDE.md
- agentkit improve . --optimize-context
